chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.2825 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on M.A. No.15016/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on M.A. No.15017/2025 (Ex/A). 3. For hearing of bail application..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 17.10.2025 M/s. Irfanullah Khan and Abdus Samad, Advocates for Applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2-3. Through this Criminal Bail Application, the applicant/accused Lal Das son of Peer Dad seeks protective bail in FIR No.194/2023 under Section-147/148/149/353/324/186/427 PPC, registered at P.S Docks. Learned counsel for the applicant/accused inter alia contends the applicant/accused was on pre-arrest bail, on 06.08.2025 on account of his ailment an application for condonation of his absence was filed but learned Judge dismissed the same; that the trial Court issued NBWs to arrest the applicant/accused and he apprehends of his arrest, therefore, the NBWs issued by the trial Court may be suspended so that the applicant may be able to surrender before the trial Court for his bail, hence this application for protective bail. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is granted protective bail for a period of 07 days from today i.e 17.10.2025 to 23.10.2025 (both days inclusive), subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. The applicant is directed to surrender before the trial Court. In the meanwhile, operation of the NBWs issued by the trial Court shall remain suspended.

The applicant is directed to surrender before the trial Court. In the meanwhile, operation of the NBWs issued by the trial Court shall remain suspended. This protective bail shall cease to have its effect after expiry of 07 days period i.e. 23.10.2025 or when the Applicant surrenders himself before the concerned Court, whichever be earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case, the applicant fails to make his appearance before the trial Court within a prescribed time, the surety submitted before this Court shall stand forfeited. Instant bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
